eyes: eyes widen briefly while the gaze stays fixed
breath: a short inhale through the mouth
posture: the upper body freezes for a beat
hands: one hand lifts involuntarily toward the chest

eyes: a slow blink while the gaze stays fixed
posture: the head tilts a few degrees

eyes: the gaze darts once toward the threat
hands: the fingers tense around the held object

eyes: the gaze settles on the objective

face: one corner of the mouth tightens
posture: the head turns before the shoulders follow

eyes: the gaze softens and remains steady
hands: the touch becomes slower and lighter

breath: a controlled breath through the nose
hands: the fingers curl once and release

eyes: the gaze drops briefly before returning
face: the lips open as if to speak, then close
hands: the reaching hand pauses short of contact
